jetson_nano_4gb.runtime: ONNX Runtime with TensorRT execution provider
jetson_nano_4gb.frame_strategy: sparse patrol frames plus event-triggered bursts

raspberry_pi_ai_4gb.runtime: ONNX Runtime or accelerator vendor runtime
